title: appicon resolve --json result
description: Stable consumer contract for appicon resolve --json. See docs/consumer-contract.md.

path.description: Absolute local file path on success

source.description: Stage that produced the hit, or empty on miss

cached.description: Whether the hit came from appicon durable cache

tried.description: Present with --explain / explain=true: stage labels that missed before the hit or final miss

hint.description: Present with --explain on miss: actionable next steps
